scripts.build:ui: rmdir /s /q build 2> nul && cd ..\part-frontend && npm run build -- --prod && xcopy build ..\gitPhonebookBackend /e /i /h
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build:ui && git add . && git commit -m uibuild && npm run deploy
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli sourcemaps inject --org marc-antoni-mas --project node-express ./out && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org marc-antoni-mas --project node-express ./out
